stories.title: Are the Spurs cooked? How the Knicks have slowed d...
stories.summary: Let's break down Game 2 from all angles, then look ahead to a massive Game 3 in New York.

stories.title: Knicks survive Spurs rush for 2-0 NBA Finals lead
stories.summary: Karl-Anthony Towns carried the Knicks on both ends of the floor as New York held off San Antonio in Game 2 and became just the third team to win the first two games of the NBA Finals on the road.

stories.title: Wemby rues costly turnover: 'This game was ours'
stories.summary: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama admitted urgency got the better of him when he committed a late turnover in Friday's Game 2 loss, but he said he would use the frustration as fuel for the next game.

stories.title: Reports: NCAA rejects TTU's appeal for QB Sorsby
stories.summary: The NCAA has denied Texas Tech's appeal to reinstate quarterback Brendan Sorsby's eligibility, according to multiple reports.

stories.title: Sources: NBA interviews Kawhi in Aspiration case
stories.summary: \Kawhi Leonard and his business adviser have been interviewed by NBA investigators amid the league's inquiry into allegations the Clippers circumvented the salary cap to compensate Leonard, sources said.
